history.content:
<thought>
The agent is facing north at row 07 column D. The cell directly ahead is lava (L). The left cell is a wall (#), and the right cell is a floor (.). The goal is at row 05 column E, which is two rows north and one column east. The immediate safe move is to turn right to face east, then later move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7, column D, facing north. The cell directly in front (row 6, column D) is a safe floor tile. The goal is at row 5, column B. I can reach it by moving forward, then turning left, moving forward twice, then turning right and moving forward. The immediate safe action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7, D) and facing north. The goal is at (6, B), which is two cells to the left and one cell up. Moving forward would go to (6, D), which is a dead end (north wall, east wall, west lava). A better path is to turn left to face west, then move forward to (7, C), continue left to (7, B), then forward to the goal. Therefore, I will turn left to orient towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, D) facing north. The cell directly ahead is (6, D), which is floor. The goal is at (5, E). I can move forward to (6, D) safely, then continue north to (5, D), and finally turn east to reach the goal. So moving forward now is the correct step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 06, column E, which is one cell ahead and one cell to the right of my current position. The cell directly in front of me (row 06, column D) is floor, so I can move forward safely. After moving, I will be adjacent to the goal and can then turn right to face it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07 column D, facing north (since '^' indicates position and direction upward). The goal is immediately to the east at row 07 column E. The cell directly in front (north) is a wall (#), so we cannot move forward. We need to turn right to face east, then we can move into the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me at row 06, column D. The cell is marked 'G', so it is safe to move into. I will move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
